{{Infobox character
| name = Grand Elder Emara
| aliases = Emara
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Emara is the [[Grand Elder]] of [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Grand Elder Emara]] has not held her position for long.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Grand Elder Emara]] is part of the Heaven’s Glory group.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
